since_last: 38% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.54%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.06% · BTC -0.57% · Gold +0.80% · Nasdaq100 +0.37%. 38% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.54%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.54%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.24%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SNAP is the standout at -13.57%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +12.36%, AMAT +7.72%, TLN +7.53%, ARM +6.66%, AVGO +5.89%. Laggards: SNAP -13.57%, CRNC -5.84%, SOUN -4.37%, AMBA -4.12%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.42% at $189.77
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.42% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
